title: linaria multicaulis subsp. pseudosupina
intro: Linaria multicaulis subsp. pseudosupina, a rare and lesser-known species of the Linaria genus, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Linaria multicaulis subsp. pseudosupina are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat a range of health conditions.
